notes.content: Acknowledged. Token expiry was missed — not in rotation calendar. Pipeline failure is a downstream effect of the bad token.

Root cause: deployer SA token was never rotated after initial provisioning (95 days ago). Fix: rotated token, updated OCP_FIN_KUBECONFIG in GitLab CI variables. Lesson: add a 50-day reminder to the team calendar for all CI tokens.
Token rotation scheduled for Friday 2026-03-28. No immediate impact on pipelines.
Runners appear offline. Checking the runner host VM.
VM was out of disk space. Cleared /tmp, runners back online. Pipeline re-triggered.

issues: GitLab API error: API /api/v4/projects/555/pipelines returned 503: service unavailable

notes.content: Rolebindings were not applied during initial namespace setup for hrm-sit and hrm-uat. Raised with platform team to apply ci-image-builder and ci-deployer bindings.

issues: app has no OCP service accounts (gitlab-only)

notes.content: New app onboarding in progress. OCP SAs will be provisioned by platform team.
SAs provisioned: newapp-image-builder, newapp-deployer. Rolebindings applied to newapp-sit and newapp-uat. Resolved.
Transient test failure in pfm-sit. Re-triggered pipeline — passed. No action needed.
